description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage with a job named pages. The pages job runs on the master branch (using only: - master), uses the default Docker image, and executes the shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It then publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact by specifying artifacts.paths: public. No additional services, caches, or variables are needed.
